name: Hot Chili Beef and Onion Soup- Yukkai Jang K2
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp White Sesame Seeds, Toasted and Ground
recipeInstructions:
This chili-red soup is exceptionally hot. It is said that the time to serve it is in the hottest months, when the perspiration it induces has a cooling effect on the diner. It is equally effective ammunition against winter cold.
1. Cut the beef into cubes and place in a saucepan with the water. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat and simmer gently for 1-1/2 to 2 hours until the meat is falling apart.
2. Mix the chili powder with the sesame oil. Trim and shred the green onions. Heat the chili powder and sesame oil in a pan and fry the green onions with the garlic for 2 minutes. Add the sesame seeds, sugar, pepper, and soy sauce and fry for 2 to 3 minutes over medium heat.
3. Lift out the meat, drain well, and toss it in the pan. Return the contents of the pan to the stock and bring to a boil. Simmer until the soup is well flavored.
